description: Create a 'Defense in Depth' cybersecurity pyramid diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax. The diagram must feature a 5-tier pyramid structure labeled from bottom (widest) to top (narrowest) with these exact texts: 'Physical Security', 'Network Security', 'Host Security', 'Application Security', and 'Data Security'. Include a title 'Defense in Depth Model' near the pyramid. Save the project as /home/ga/Documents/defense_in_depth_pyramid.eddx and export the diagram as /home/ga/Documents/defense_in_depth_pyramid.png. Dismiss any account login dialogs if they appear.
